Interface SpecificationContainer

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultSpecificationContainer
public interface SpecificationContainer
Container for parsed RIFL specifications. Each query returns the assigned security level (domain) for an element represented as a String, or null if the element is not assigned a domain. RIFL specifications are not validated in any way. Categories in RIFL are currently treated opaque.
